source.body_text_sample:

About
Join our team
Current openings

Thanks for your interest in joining the Sierra Club BC team! We are not currently hiring. Please stay tuned for future openings.

We are an equal opportunity employer

Sierra Club BC is committed to equity and respect for all peoples in all of our work. We are committed to reflecting the diversity of our society both in our workplace and in our campaigns and programs. As one of Canada’s leading environmental organizations, we remain committed to pursuing justice in regard to the environment and understand that there is no true environmental justice without social justice.

We are committed to taking active steps in our workplace, program and campaign policies and practices to address the under-representation of, and direct or indirect discrimination against historically marginalized groups.

As an equal opportunity employer, we encourage women, people of Indigenous ancestry, people of colour, LGBTQQIP2SA individuals and members of other diverse communities to apply for careers with our organization.

Want to be alerted of new job openings?

Sign up for our newsletter and have the latest postings sent right to your inbox.
